notes: Sasha's six-face die. WILD face gates on Verb banked.

faces.description: Success ★★. You meet across the room without crossing it.
Success ★. You pass each other softly.
Partial. Spend 1 Verb to convert to ★.
Partial. Spend 1 Verb to convert to ★.
Failure. You miss each other. +1 Verb.
Wild. Counts as ★ if you have at least 1 Verb banked; counts as failure otherwise.
